task_completion.description: Select the 'Gideon v. Wainwright' case in the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'Gideon v. Wainwright' is highlighted or selected in the main library pane of the application (Jurism).

task_completion.description: Open the dialog to attach a link to a URI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attach Link to URI' menu option is clicked or the corresponding dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Oyez URL into the URL field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'https://www.oyez.org/cases/1962/155' is visible in the URL input field of the attachment dialog.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified title into the Title field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Oyez Transcript' is visible in the Title input field of the attachment dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the link is successfully attached as a child item to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A child item titled 'Oyez Transcript' (typically with a link icon) is visible and indented under the 'Gideon v. Wainwright' parent item in the library pane.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to attach the link.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the application's menus and dialogs, not terminal commands or database editing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the link is a genuine child attachment and not a standalone item.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Oyez Transcript' item must appear hierarchically under the 'Gideon v. Wainwright' case (indented), rather than as a separate top-level library item.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual application dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL and title must be typed into the application's specific 'Attach Link to URI' dialog box, not a generic text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target case: 'Gideon v. Wainwright'. Expected URL: 'https://www.oyez.org/cases/1962/155'. Expected Title: 'Oyez Transcript'. The attachment must be created using the 'Attach Link to URI' feature (LinkMode 3) in the application (Jurism/Zotero).
